name: habeebs-skill
description: Research-grounded engineering methodology for Claude Code. Find how the best teams shipped what you're building, capture it as one plain-language Design, grill the ambiguity out and sign off, then implement via TDD over vertical slices with deep-modules discipline and anti-slop verify before commit. A Human layer you read (prior-art-research → draft-spec writes the Design → socratic-grill) then a Machine layer for the implementing agent (vertical-slice → tdd-loop → release); decision-record (ADR) fires only for one-way-door decisions and write-plan only for multi-phase work. Supporting primitives: verify-output (anti-slop gate before each tdd-loop commit), parallel-dev, deep-modules, using-worktrees, systematic-debugging, agent-factors-check, devex-review, security-audit, setup-habeebs-skill.
